description: A logistics planner needs to forecast the demand for a specific type of landing gear brake assembly for the next year.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the historical consumption data for the brake assembly for the past 5 years.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all historical usage data for the part.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the data along with the future flight schedules for the fleet to create a demand forecast.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a forecast predicting the need for 50 brake assemblies over the next 12 months.

nodes.task_description: Adjust inventory reorder points based on the new forecast to ensure parts availability.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the inventory management system with new reorder points.
